[2nd Anniversary Special Live Stream Gift]

Have you enjoyed Kivotos Live, Sensei?
The special gift celebrating the event has arrived!

🗓️Event Period: 10/28 (Sat) 12:00 PM – 11/6 (Mon) 2:59 PM (UTC)
